name: for_checklist
description: Checklist plugin for TinyMCE (FriendsOfREDAXO, free & open-source) — modern checkbox styling, imports CKEditor 5 todo lists

scripts.build-copy: mkdir -p ../../assets/scripts/tinymce/plugins/ && cp -r dist/for_checklist/ ../../assets/scripts/tinymce/plugins/for_checklist/ && mkdir -p ../../assets/vendor/tinymce/plugins/ && cp -r dist/for_checklist/ ../../assets/vendor/tinymce/plugins/for_checklist/

author: FriendsOfREDAXO
